content.text: Excellent! Now let me look at the structure of the store to understand state management and check for any additional documentation:

content.content:
1	# CLAUDE.md
2	
3	This file provides guidance to Claude Code (claude.ai/code) when working with code in this repository.
4	
5	## Project
6	
7	clui is a TUI wrapper around the Claude Code SDK (`@anthropic-ai/claude-agent-sdk`) providing multi-session tabs with process isolation, skills management, context tools, and git worktree support. Built with Ink 6 (React 19) for the terminal UI.
8	
9	## Architecture
10	
11	**Shell + Workers model:**
12	- **Shell process** — Main Ink/React TUI. Renders three-column layout (session sidebar, chat, skills sidebar), tab bar, input, status bar. UI state managed via Zustand. Spawns/supervises worker processes.
13	- **Worker processes** — One per tab. Each runs its own Claude Agent SDK instance in isolation. Communicates with shell via IPC over Unix Domain Sockets (JSON protocol).
14	- **SQLite** (`better-sqlite3`) — Shared persistence for sessions, messages, pins, snapshots, settings.
15	
16	Key directories:
17	- `src/shell/` — UI components, Zustand store slices, React hooks
18	- `src/worker/` — Per-tab worker: Claude SDK bridge, context manager, worktree manager
19	- `src/shared/` — Types, IPC protocol, DB helpers, config
20	- `src/cli/` — Argument parsing
21	- `db/migrations/` — SQLite migrations
22	
23	## Build & Dev Commands
24	
25	```bash
26	npm run build      # tsup → dist/
27	npm run dev        # tsup --watch
28	npm start          # node dist/index.js
29	npm test           # vitest
30	```
31	
32	Entry points: `src/index.tsx` (shell), `src/worker/index.ts` (worker). Both are separate tsup entry points — worker is forked via `child_process.fork()`.
33	
34	## Tech Stack
35	
36	TypeScript, Ink 6, React 19, Zustand, better-sqlite3, simple-git, tsup, vitest
37	
38	## Key Design Decisions
39	
40	- Workers are fully isolated — one crash doesn't affect shell or other tabs. Cross-tab context is opt-in via explicit IPC request.
41	- IPC uses Unix Domain Sockets (`node:net`), not stdin/stdout. JSON-framed messages.
42	- Skills have three-tier cascade: repo (`.claude/skills/`) > user (`~/.claude/skills/`) > global. Higher tier overrides same-named lower tier.
43	- Pins are either one-shot (next prompt only) or sticky (persists across prompts in session).
44	- `better-sqlite3` is external in tsup config (native module, can't be bundled).
45	
46	## Specs & Plans
47	
48	- Design spec: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-04-03-clui-design.md`
49	- Implementation plan: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-04-03-clui-implementation.md`
50

content.text:
Perfect! I have all the information needed. Let me create a comprehensive report.

---

## CLUI TUI Project Structure Analysis

I've thoroughly explored the clui project at `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui`. This is a **TypeScript/React terminal UI** (not Rust) built with Ink 6 and React 19. Here's the complete breakdown:

### 1. MAIN LAYOUT COMPONENT

**File:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/shell/components/Layout.tsx`

The main layout uses a **3-column flex layout**:

```typescript
<Box flexDirection="row" width="100%" height={termHeight}>
  <Box width={sidebarWidth} flexDirection="column" borderStyle="single" borderColor="gray">
    {sessionSidebar}
  </Box>
  
  <Box flexDirection="column" flexGrow={1}>
    {center}
  </Box>
  
  <Box width={sidebarWidth} flexDirection="column" borderStyle="single" borderColor="gray">
    {skillsSidebar}
  </Box>
</Box>
```

**Layout Dimensions:**
- Terminal height: Retrieved dynamically from `useStdout().rows`
- Sidebar width: **24 characters** (default, configurable)
- Center area: Flexible growth (`flexGrow={1}`) to fill remaining space
- Structure: Row-based (`flexDirection="row"`) with fixed-width sidebars flanking a flexible center

### 2. SIDEBAR IMPLEMENTATIONS

#### Session Sidebar
**File:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/shell/components/SessionSidebar.tsx`

**Features:**
- Filter input with `/` prefix
- Session list with colored indicators (7 colors cycling)
- Selection with arrow keys (up/down navigation)
- Inline rename with `r` key
- Color cycle with `c` key
- Date formatting (MM/DD) and cost display
- Selected session highlighted in white, unselected in gray
- Keyboard hints shown at bottom

**Structure:**
```typescript
<Box flexDirection="column" padding={1}>
  <Text bold color="cyan">Sessions</Text>
  {/* Filter input */}
  {/* Session rows with colored bullets */}
</Box>
```

#### Skills Sidebar
**File:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/shell/components/SkillsSidebar.tsx`

**Features:**
- 3-tier skill hierarchy: Repo > User > Global
- Collapsible tiers with `[v]` (expanded) / `[>]` (collapsed)
- Checked status indicators `[x]` (active) / `[ ]` (overridden)
- Tier labels with colors: green (Repo), blue (User), magenta (Global)
- Keyboard toggles: `1/2/3` for tier expansion

**Both sidebars:**
- No explicit borders on sidebars themselves
- Borders applied by Layout wrapper: `borderStyle="single"` + `borderColor="gray"`
- Internal padding: `padding={1}` (1 space)

### 3. INPUT BOX IMPLEMENTATION

**File:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/shell/components/InputBar.tsx`

```typescript
<Box borderStyle="single" borderColor="gray" borderTop={false} paddingX={1}>
  <Text color="green">> </Text>
  <TextInput
    value={value}
    onChange={setValue}
    onSubmit={handleSubmit}
    placeholder={disabled ? "Waiting for response..." : "Type a message..."}
    focus={!disabled}
  />
</Box>
```

**Styling:**
- Border style: `single` (light box-drawing characters)
- Border color: `gray`
- Border on all sides except top: `borderTop={false}`
- Padding: `paddingX={1}` (1 space left/right)
- Prefix: Green `>` prompt indicator
- Uses `ink-text-input` component for input handling

### 4. CENTER AREA LAYOUT (Chat + Context + Input + Status)

**File:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/app.tsx`

The center column stacks vertically:

```typescript
<Box flexDirection="column" flexGrow={1}>
  <TabBar />           {/* With borderBottom={false} */}
  <ChatView />         {/* flexGrow={1} to fill space */}
  <ContextBar />       {/* With borderBottom={false} */}
  <InputBar />
  <StatusBar />
</Box>
```

#### Tab Bar
**File:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/shell/components/TabBar.tsx`

- Border: `borderStyle="single"`, `borderColor="gray"`, `borderBottom={false}`
- Padding per tab: `paddingX={1}`
- Active tab in cyan/bold, inactive in gray
- Shows tab index and name (e.g., "1: New Session")
- `[+]` button for new tabs

#### Chat View
**File:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/shell/components/ChatView.tsx`

- `flexDirection="column"`, `flexGrow={1}` to expand
- Uses Ink's `<Static>` component for immutable message history
- Messages use `marginBottom={1}` for spacing
- User messages: green with `> ` prefix
- Assistant messages: white with `  ` prefix
- System messages: gray, dimmed
- Streaming content shows cyan cursor `|`

#### Context Bar
**File:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/shell/components/ContextBar.tsx`

- Border: `borderStyle="single"`, `borderColor="gray"`, `borderBottom={false}`
- Wrapping layout: `flexDirection="row"`, `flexWrap="wrap"`
- Sticky pins: cyan `[pin]` badges
- One-shot pins: yellow `[1x]` badges
- Hidden when no pins present

#### Status Bar
**File:** `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/clui/src/shell/components/StatusBar.tsx`

- Row layout with `gap={1}` between fields
- Fields rendered conditionally:
  - Model: green
  - Tokens: yellow (formatted with M/k suffixes)
  - Context percent: color-coded (green <50%, yellow 50-80%, red >80%)
  - Cost: cyan
  - Duration: magenta
  - Git branch: yellow (or "@ no git" in gray)
  - Diff stats: +green, -red, ~yellow
- Separator: gray `|` pipes between fields

### 5. BORDER & BOX DRAWING CHARACTERS

**Ink's borderStyle values used:**
- `"single"` — Standard light box-drawing characters:
  - Horizontal: `─`
  - Vertical: `│`
  - Corners: `┌ ┐ └ ┘`
  - Junctions: `├ ┤ ┬ ┴ ┼`
  
- `"double"` — Heavy/double characters (used only in WorktreePrompt):
  - Horizontal: `═`
  - Vertical: `║`
  - Corners: `╔ ╗ ╚ ╝`
  - Junctions: `╠ ╣ ╦ ╩ ╬`

**Colors used:**
- Borders: `"gray"` (except WorktreePrompt which uses `"yellow"`)
- Text: green, white, cyan, yellow, red, magenta, blue, gray

### 6. RESIZE AND INTERACTION SUPPORT

**No native mouse/resize support exists in the codebase.** However:

**Keyboard interactions implemented:**
- **Tab navigation:** Ctrl+T (new), Ctrl+W (close), Ctrl+1-9 (switch tabs), Tab/Shift+Tab (cycle)
- **Sidebar toggles:** Ctrl+H (sessions), Ctrl+S (skills)
- **Context management:** Ctrl+R (reset), Ctrl+Shift+S (snapshot)
- **Session sidebar:** Arrow keys (navigate), Enter (open), r (rename), c (cycle color)
- **Skills sidebar:** 1/2/3 (toggle tiers)
- **Compact detail:** x (expand/collapse)
- **Worktree prompt:** k (keep), c (cleanup), Esc (cancel)

**All UI interactions are keyboard-driven via Ink's `useInput()` hook.** There is no mouse support or dynamic resizing of sidebars/columns.

### 7. KEY COMPONENT FILES SUMMARY

| Component | File | Purpose |
|-----------|------|---------|
| **Layout** | `Layout.tsx` | Main 3-column flex container |
| **SessionSidebar** | `SessionSidebar.tsx` | Left sidebar (24px), session list + filter |
| **SkillsSidebar** | `SkillsSidebar.tsx` | Right sidebar (24px), 3-tier skill browser |
| **ChatView** | `ChatView.tsx` | Center area, scrolling message history |
| **TabBar** | `TabBar.tsx` | Top of center, tab switching |
| **InputBar** | `InputBar.tsx` | Bottom of center, user input with green `>` prefix |
| **ContextBar** | `ContextBar.tsx` | Above input, sticky/one-shot pins display |
| **StatusBar** | `StatusBar.tsx` | Bottom, metadata display (model, tokens, cost, git) |
| **CompactDetail** | `CompactDetail.tsx` | Context compaction event viewer (red border) |
| **WorktreePrompt** | `WorktreePrompt.tsx` | Worktree cleanup confirmation (double yellow border) |

### 8. TECHNOLOGY STACK

- **UI Framework:** Ink 6.8.0 with React 19.2.4
- **Input:** ink-text-input 6.0.0
- **State Management:** Zustand 5.0.12
- **IPC:** Node.js net (Unix Domain Sockets)
- **Database:** better-sqlite3 12.8.0
- **Build:** tsup, TypeScript 6.0.2

All borders and styling are handled by Ink's declarative props (`borderStyle`, `borderColor`, `flexDirection`, padding, margins, colors). No custom box-drawing code exists.
